spellcasting.description: The planetar casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20):

traits.name: Divine Awareness
traits.description: The planetar knows if it hears a lie.

traits.name: Exalted Restoration
traits.description: If the planetar dies outside Mount Celestia, its body disappears, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in Mount Celestia.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The planetar has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The planetar makes three Radiant Sword attacks or uses Holy Burst twice.

actions.name: Radiant Sword
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 10 ft. Hit: 14 (2d6 + 7) Slashing damage plus 18 (4d8) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Holy Burst
actions.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC 20, each enemy in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point the planetar can see within 120 feet. Failure: 24 (7d6) Radiant damage. Success: Half damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description: The planetar casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as spellcasting ability (spell save DC 20): At Will: Detect Evil and Good; 1/Day Each: Commune, Control Weather, Dispel Evil and Good, Raise Dead

bonus_actions.name: Divine Aid (2/Day)
bonus_actions.description: The planetar casts Cure Wounds, Invisibility, Lesser Restoration, or Remove Curse, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

tactical_info.environment: Mount Celestia, divine temples, sites of great good, celestial battlefields
tactical_info.tactics: Uses holy burst for area damage, radiant sword for high single-target damage, divine aid for support, powerful spellcasting
tactical_info.weaknesses: Vulnerable to overwhelming evil magic, limited daily spell uses, predictable good alignment
